rulings.Case Title: BAY RIDGE PROPERTIES LLC VS. AMERICAN BROKERS CONDUIT CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Second Amended Notice Of Motion Regarding Subpoena To North American Title Insurance Company
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 12, 2017 line 1. INTERVENOR WELLS FARGO, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR THE STRUCTURED ASSET MORTGAGE INVESTMENTSS II TRUST'S Second Amended Motion Regarding Subpoena To North American Title Insurance Company RFPs 18 and 19 is DENIED. Per Lewis, the title insurer's knowledge is not imputed to the insured.= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ABRAHAM NEWMAN VS. PHYLIS KURZBARD ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 12, 2017 line 3. PLAINTIFF ABRAHAM NEWMAN's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION For Partition By Sale DENIED. A triable issue of material fact exists as to the appropriate method of partition. = (501/REQ)
